speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah . It's been raining a lot these days .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have been watching a lot of videos at home because of the constant rain .

speaker: speaker2
text: Have you heard when it's supposed to get better ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I saw the weather report , and it's going to rain for the next eight days .

speaker: speaker2
text: That sucks so much . What are we going to do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm getting pretty bored . We should do something despite the rain .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm with you . What do you have in mind ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I haven't been to the Mall in a long time . Let's go there .

speaker: speaker2
text: That sounds good . They have a movie theatre there , so if we get bored , we can watch a movie .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great . I'll stop by your place now .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ok . Don't forget to bring your umbrella . The rain can start up again anytime .
